creator: jgrosch@juniper.net
text:
A known good Adaptec 4805SAS controller (works fine under 6.2 i386) and
new, known good hardware causes the system to panic. The system was booted
off of FreeBSD 6.2 - AMD64 install CD. When the loaded kernel probed the
controller it paniced with the following message

  Fatal trap 12: page fault while in kernel mode

A screen shot of the panic message can be found at 
 
  http://www.mooseriver.com/~jgrosch/FreeBSD/dump.png

This problem also exists with FreeBSD 6.1 - AMD64

How-To-Repeat: Boot the system with a FreeBSD 6.x - amd64 install CD
